name: Battlefield 3 Campaign
post_apply_message:
Battlefield 3 Campaign (non-Steam, cracked repack) — CAMPAIGN ONLY. BF3's multiplayer launched through Battlelog (a browser plugin) and those servers are long dead, so single-player is the whole game here.

Apply AUTO-ADDS a Steam shortcut for bf3.exe with NO launch options — GE-Proton 10.34, game folder as start dir, a stable computed appid. Steam closes briefly to write it; stage GE first with 'gfm stage-runner'. It also drops a user.cfg into the game folder with 'WorldRender.DxDeferredCsPathEnable false' (a free FPS boost in open/outdoor areas, no visual change). Origin/EA DRM is handled by your repack's crack (the .par Origin-requirement patch) — no EA App needed.

WHY NO LAUNCH OPTIONS: the documented way to reach the campaign past Battlelog is 'bf3.exe singleplayer', and this recipe originally set it. Tony tested on real hardware 2026-07-13 — the game ONLY launched once he REMOVED it. This repack's bf3.exe already boots the campaign by itself, so the argument is both unnecessary and fatal. Leave LaunchOptions EMPTY; don't 'restore' the documented arg.

CONTROLLER: the pad WORKS, but the in-game prompts are keyboard/mouse ONLY even with a gamepad selected in Steam Input — and there is NO fix. DICE shipped gamepad prompts on console and never on PC; the prompt logic + UI assets are baked into Frostbite and no mod addresses it (a long-standing, never-solved complaint). Don't go hunting for a button-icon mod, it doesn't exist — you just have to know your own bindings. Some menus and quick-time events also want a keyboard, so a Steam Input layout mapping face/menu buttons to those keys is worth building.

UI SCALING (optional): BF3 doesn't scale its HUD/menus above 1280x720, so at 1920x1200 (Legion) everything looks tiny. The community 'BF3 UI Scaling Fix' fixes it (rename Engine.BuildInfo_Win32_Retail_dll.dll -> ori_..., drop the mod dll). It can trip MP anti-cheat, but this is campaign-only so that's moot. Say the word and I'll wire it into the recipe.

FOV: default is 60-90 vertical; widen it by editing PROF_SAVE_profile in the prefix's Documents/Battlefield 3/settings, or with BF3 Settings Editor.
notes:
Built 2026-07-13 (drafted ahead of Tony installing it — his copy is 'Battlefield 3 - [DODI Repack].zip' in NAS Rom_Library/roms/win, not yet on the SD/mapped). Real Steam appid is 1238820 but Tony's is a non-Steam cracked repack -> non-Steam shortcut, computed appid (no gospel backup). CAMPAIGN ONLY by design (MP = Battlelog browser launcher, servers dead).

LAUNCH ARG — TESTED AND WRONG (2026-07-13): PCGW Battlefield_3 'Play Campaign Offline' + community say to run bf3.exe with the 'singleplayer' argument to reach the campaign past Battlelog, and the recipe shipped with LaunchOptions '%command% singleplayer'. On Tony's real hardware the game would NOT launch until he removed it; with empty LaunchOptions it works and goes straight to the campaign. The repack's bf3.exe evidently already does this. Step now sets no launch_options (steam_shortcut defaults to "", which also CLEARS any stale value). Do not re-add the documented arg on the strength of the docs — it's been falsified here.

Repack's crack patches the .par Origin-requirement file (NoFaTe remover), so no EA App/Origin. Config + saves live in Documents/Battlefield 3/settings (PROF_SAVE_body/header/profile, meta.xml) inside the prefix — game-folder-independent, so no gospel prefix needed. Perf: user.cfg WorldRender.DxDeferredCsPathEnable false committed (documented FPS boost). Widescreen native but UI won't scale >720p (BF3 UI Scaling Fix mod available, MP-anticheat-incompatible but campaign-only so fine — NOT bundled yet, flagged in message). CONTROLLER: pad works, but in-game prompts are keyboard/mouse ONLY and there is NO mod — Tony asked for a button-icon mod 2026-07-13; researched and none exists (EA forums / AnandTech threads show it's a long-standing unfixed complaint). Console builds had gamepad prompts; the PC port never did, and the prompt logic + assets sit inside Frostbite. Answer is 'no', don't re-research it.

CONFIRMED on the SD 2026-07-13: exe IS bf3.exe at the game root (verified against Tony's F:\games\Battlefield 3 install — 368 files / 12.36GB, no repack SP launcher; the only other exes are Core/activation.exe, EAProxyInstaller.exe and installer junk). Detection matched 'Battlefield 3' by name on the SD scan. Frostbite 2 engine; ProtonDB app 1238820.
